positive: A stylized, whimsical depiction of a forest scene viewed through a circular window or keyhole. The main subject is a gentle, luminous group of forest creatures: an owl perched on a mossy branch, a fox with soft silhouette, and tiny deer drinking from a crystal clear stream. Incorporate bioluminescent flora (glowing mushrooms, glowing vines) and deep jewel-toned leaves. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau line art and modern flat vector illustration, optimized for high contrast and clean edges. Composition should be centered and symmetrical, with strong graphic silhouettes against a softly gradient background of twilight blues and emerald greens. The overall feeling is magical, peaceful, and inviting, perfect for a repeating pattern or centered apparel print. High resolution, clean lines, print-ready.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low quality, text, signature, watermark, logo, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, noise, extra limbs, cropped, messy lines, ultra realistic, 3d render
